policy.approval_note: No backlog item is APPROVED for implementation by this file.
policy.c002_g0_notice: No backlog item is APPROVED or IMPLEMENTED while CG-PARITY-G0 remains PARTIAL/open.

items.title: Linaje de DB_GLOBAL_INVENTARIO
evidence: Requested as shared research backlog item.
C001 Codex validation: BASE has four formula-derived columns and eight direct source columns.
C001 Codex validation: duplicados is ignored by the loader and DB dedupe is enforced by conflict key.
C001 Codex validation: formula freshness risk is real, but mtime-only guard must be reformulated.
items.required_next_action: Design formula/cache freshness and parity checks; no loader change approved.

items.title: Linaje de DB_GLOBAL_HISTORICO
evidence: Requested as shared research backlog item.
C001 Codex validation: external DB_GLOBAL_HISTORICO Hoja1 has BASE-style 12 columns and no runtime reference found.
C001 Codex validation: internal DB_HISTORICA has 10-column schema, not BASE-identical.
C001 Codex validation: public.fact_stock_venta aggregate date coverage did not cover the external historical workbook range observed.
items.required_next_action: Clarify authoritative historical source with Bastian before any retirement proposal.

items.title: Linaje de CUMPLIMIENTO_FRECUENCIA
evidence: data/CUMPLIMIENTO_FRECUENCIA.xlsx sheet DB (KPIONE2.0) recorded as productive Control Gestion source under investigation.
C001 Codex validation: CUMPLIMIENTO_FRECUENCIA has seven sheets and the committed loader consumes only three DB source sheets.
C001 Codex validation: DESARROLLO_CONTROL_GESTION and OUT have no committed loader/runtime consumers found in this pass.
items.required_next_action: Confirm manual use of DESARROLLO_CONTROL_GESTION and OUT before workbook governance changes.

items.title: Utilidad real de row_hash y acumulacion historica
evidence: Requested as shared research backlog item.
C001 Codex validation: row_hash is analysis fingerprint, not upsert key.
C001 DB profile: route history has 19 batches and 64346 history rows.
C001 DB profile: ruta_rutero_load_rows has DB view consumers; row_hash itself had no DB definition hit in the allowlisted profile.
items.required_next_action: Separate row_hash utility from route history retention and consumer analysis.

items.title: Catalogo de objetos Supabase y consumidores
evidence: Runtime map identifies app/db.py as central DB access layer.
No DB access was performed during bootstrap.
C001 Codex validation: app/db.py CG_V2 constant list corrected.
C001 DB profile: selected cg_core/cg_mart views consume payload_json and route history.
C001 validation did not produce a complete DB object catalog.
items.required_next_action: Build a full authoritative DB object catalog before cleanup.

items.title: Justificacion de JOIN, hashes y raw duplicado
evidence: Requested as shared research backlog item.
C001 Codex validation disputes payload_json removal because DB views consume it.
C001 Codex validation confirms CG loader hash-skip/batch_registry behavior.
C001 Codex validation confirms incremental refresh commit occurs before post-commit ANALYZE.
C002 memory update: DB-002 remains blocked for retention while CG-PARITY-G0 is PARTIAL/open.
No Supabase cleanup, payload_json removal, raw retention, or storage work is authorized by C002 B0.
items.required_next_action: Keep retention/storage work blocked until daily and weekly parity G0 are closed.

items.title: Responsabilidades concentradas en app/db.py
evidence: Codex validation counted app/db.py as central data access module with 149 functions.
Claude and Codex both identified concentrated responsibilities in app/db.py.
C001 Codex validation: app/db.py has 10 named static-only functions with no known dynamic caller pattern.
C001 Codex validation: app/db.py counts corrected to 80 f-string SQL blocks, 35 JOIN clauses, 22 WITH patterns, 54 os.getenv calls.
C001 Codex validation: Home.py defers db/export/screen imports inside main().
items.required_next_action: Treat static-only functions as cleanup candidates only after separate approval and runtime smoke.

items.title: Fallback B3 visible y controlado
evidence: Codex static validation found active B3 callers in app/screens/control_gestion.py.
USE_CG_V2 != "1" uses B3 directly.
An uncaught exception in the main v2 block can continue toward B3 fallback.

items.title: Propuesta de SYSTEM MAP
evidence: Claude runtime map was useful but partial.
Codex required corrections before a durable system map.
C003 Codex validation promoted AI_PROJECT_HORIZON.json and AI_CAPABILITY_MAP.json as living contracts.
items.required_next_action: Use promoted horizon and capability map as required context before future Claude/Codex research or implementation.

items.title: Contrato temporal de reconstruccion CG affected_date_window
evidence: CG-PARITY-001 validated net surplus root cause.
CG-PARITY-002 validated need for explicit affected_date_window.
C002 B0 E1 removed all extra keys with fecha_visita >= 2026-05-11.
items.required_next_action: Define and test explicit affected_date_window before any future mart reconstruction.

items.title: Politica versionada de snapshot RUTA_RUTERO
evidence: CG-ROUTE-SNAPSHOT-001: week 2026-06-01 aligns better with ruta_batch 16/17 than batch 18.
Route16 dedup reduced value differences but did not close parity.
items.required_next_action: Define authoritative route snapshot policy by week before closing G0.

items.title: Weekly derivado desde daily staged
evidence: CG-WEEKLY-001: weekly view is inefficient as raw reconstruction surface.
One-week materialization timed out at 180s; full weekly timed out at 900s.
items.required_next_action: Rebuild weekly parity from staged daily and route surfaces in local lab before storage work.

items.title: Domain seam Inventory / Control Gestion
evidence: C003 capability map validates Inventory and Control Gestion as independent domains behind app/db.py.
app/screens/reposicion.py consumes app/services/stock.py, which delegates to app/db.py.
Control Gestion screen consumes app/db.py directly for V2 and B3 paths.
items.required_next_action: Design interface seam only after H0/H1 contract gates; no runtime move approved.

items.title: Shared Route Master capability
evidence: C003 reclassifies RUTA_RUTERO as shared reference data, not exclusive Control Gestion.
Route Master feeds inventory selectors and Control Gestion route snapshot/versioning evidence.
items.required_next_action: Separate Bastian semantic route policy from Codex technical snapshot lineage before extraction.

items.title: Headless capability interface
evidence: C003 horizon H4 defines Streamlit-optional capability access as future direction.
Current app/Home.py and screens remain Streamlit legacy-stable consumers.
items.required_next_action: Identify one read-only capability interface after H2 seam and runtime smoke; no implementation approved.

items.title: KPI/decision tower capability
evidence: C003 adds kpi_composition, alert_generation, and decision_and_action_tracking as future capabilities.
H5 requires Bastian productization decision; no second repo or big-bang authorized.
items.required_next_action: Prepare Bastian decision pack only after parity, contracts, and headless interfaces are stable.

items.title: Runtime observability and B3 visibility
evidence: C001/Codex validation found B3 callers active and V2 fallback path possible.
C003 capability map adds observability_and_runtime_health as future capability and keeps B3 visible/controlled.
items.required_next_action: Design fallback mode visibility and runtime health events before changing CG behavior.
